subject: CTF multiplying raw subtomograms from warp
body:
Hi all,

I'm looking at CTF correcting my warp subtomograms directly. When trying to 
multiply the subtomos with their ctf files via imod clip, I found that 
these are actually different sizes (eg. subtomos are 96x96x96 vs. ctf 
49x96x96), so I assume direct multiplication might not be the best way to 
do it. Would anyone have any suggestions about the proper way to do this?

Thanks!
Joe
